title: Piggy's Survival
description: A modpack to enhance Minecraft by adding new fun things to do, while keeping it from being too over-the-top.
body:
![Piggy's Survival](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0478ef9818529e7bd2de17af1e2e72ef3452452e.png)


This is the modpack I use during my livestreams of the Piggy's Survival series. In this modpack, several mods have been added to make Minecraft survival more fun.

Several mods, such as Panda's Falling Tree, also help make survival mode easier in Minecraft.

I highly recommend it because it's very practical in survival mode while being fun. It adds new things to explore, so you don’t get bored, and you can play with friends thanks to Essential.

I will add more mods in future updates.

Please mention the modpack in the description if you use it, that would help me a lot! :)
